name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Immerse yourself in studio-quality sound with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and premium comfort cushions. Perfect for commuters, remote workers, and audiophiles.

name: Minimalist Leather Watch
description: Crafted from genuine Italian leather with a sapphire crystal face. Water-resistant to 50m, this timepiece blends classic style with modern precision movement.

name: Premium Yoga Mat
description: Non-slip, eco-friendly natural rubber construction with alignment lines. Extra thick 6mm cushioning protects joints during intense sessions. Includes carrying strap.

name: Linen Oversized Shirt
description: Breathable 100% Belgian linen in a relaxed, boxy cut. Perfect for warm seasons. Available in a curated palette of neutral and earthy tones. Machine washable.

name: Smart Home Air Purifier
description: HEPA H13 filtration removes 99.97% of airborne particles. Covers up to 1,500 sq ft. App-controlled with air quality sensors and auto mode. Ultra-quiet sleep mode.

name: Running Shoes Ultra
description: Engineered mesh upper with reactive foam midsole for explosive energy return. Ideal for road running and training. Available in sizes 6–14.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Set
description: Hand-thrown ceramic dripper and carafe set. Perfect for the discerning coffee enthusiast who appreciates a clean, nuanced cup. Includes 40 filters.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: 15% stabilized Vitamin C with hyaluronic acid and ferulic acid. Reduces dark spots, boosts collagen production, and delivers a radiant glow in 4 weeks.

name: Architectural Design Principles
description: An essential reference for students and professionals. Covers foundational concepts from classical orders to contemporary sustainable design with 500+ illustrations.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° surround sound with deep bass. IP67 waterproof, 24-hour battery, and USB-C charging. Pair two speakers for stereo mode. Compact enough for any adventure.

name: Merino Wool Crewneck Sweater
description: Superfine 17.5-micron merino wool. Naturally temperature-regulating, anti-odor, and incredibly soft. A wardrobe staple for all seasons.

name: Cast Iron Skillet 12"
description: Pre-seasoned with organic flaxseed oil. Superior heat retention and even distribution. Oven-safe to 500°F. A lifetime cooking companion that gets better with use.
